boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the commerce agent execute the requested customer, account, refund, order, or subscription action? Focus: account credit not tied to impacted account.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL record ties ID to action
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Unresolved credit memo account ID blocks closure

final_answer: Control record confirms credit memo account ID current and tied to action per exact source boundary. Unresolved dependency on that ID keeps boundary open. Escalate for ID confirmation before any execution of account credit.
